subject: Remove snapshot dependencies
commit_message:
Remove snapshot dependencies

Remove snapshot dependencies in preparation for RC0

Had to add dependencies on dblib-provider to avoid issue
in Jenkins, where builds kept failing because of
dependency on version 0.2.1 of dblib-provider, even
for pom.xmls that did not depend on dblib-provider

Change-Id: I07949da16703821aeba226b04107eb6e3e806a65
Issue-ID: CCSDK-242
Signed-off-by: Timoney, Dan (dt5972) <dt5972@att.com>

entries.message:
Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/309/ : FAILURE

Unable to build due to a non-resolvable parent POM. Search logs for "[FATAL] Non-resolvable parent POM" to find the logs.

The fix for this is usually to make sure your poms are pointing to parents that exist. Double check:

 * groupId is correct and no typos
 * artifactId is correct and no typos
 * version is correct for branch ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/309/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/309

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/ccsdk-sli-core-master-verify-java/313/ : FAILURE

Build failed to find artifact org.onap.ccsdk.sli.core:dblib-provider:jar:0.2.1 needed for sub-project org.onap.ccsdk.sli.core:sli-common:bundle:0.2.1-SNAPSHOT.
